calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner: Alexandra Judy Contreras Jaimes, pesent in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Alexandra Judy Hernandez.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-02-2007 Reset To Aug-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Alexandra Judy Contreras Jaimes, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Unable to provide the Court with a Proof of Publication, matter is continued to Aug. 16, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to obtain an Original Proof of Publication and file with the court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Text Ruling
